title: Minepal
description: The creative inspiration for the MinePal mod comes from PalWorld. This mod introduces various pals and related gameplay elements from the original work.
body:
📖 About:
The creative inspiration for the MinePal mod comes from PalWorld. This mod introduces various pals and related gameplay elements from the original work.

Just like in the original game, players need to collect Pal Ore, craft various Pal Spheres, and expand their influence by capturing Palus. 

Players can synthesize different Palus through the Incubator, obtaining Palus with more advanced attributes. 

By equipping Palus with different items, their work efficiency and combat capability can be enhanced. Come and join the Palus in their adventure!

🌐 Requirements:

Make sure you have downloaded Geckolib.
